articles.title: 3 generations of R.I. family died in Pawtucket accident
articles.description:
The three family members were killed when their car plunged into the Seekonk River in what relatives have described as a driving lesson gone wrong.

The post 3 generations of R.I. family died in Pawtucket accident appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Three generations of a Rhode Island family died in a Pawtucket car accident.
The incident occurred when their vehicle plunged into the Seekonk River during a driving lesson.
Local residents are mourning the loss and reflecting on road safety in the area.

articles.title: Report: Celtics, Mitchell Robinson agree to three-year deal worth $47.4 million
articles.description:
Robinson recently won the NBA title as a member of the Knicks.

The post Report: Celtics, Mitchell Robinson agree to three-year deal worth $47.4 million appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics sign Mitchell Robinson to a three-year, $47.4 million deal.
Robinson recently won an NBA title with the New York Knicks.
This acquisition strengthens the Celtics' roster for the upcoming season.

articles.title: Celtics reportedly agree to one-year deal with Mike Conley Jr.
articles.description:
Conley spent the 2025-26 season with the Timberwolves.

summary: Celtics sign Mike Conley Jr. to a one-year deal for the 2026 season.
Conley previously played for the Timberwolves during the 2025-26 season.
This addition aims to strengthen the Celtics' roster for local fans.

articles.title: Left-wing insurgent ousts 15-term member of Congress in Colorado
articles.description:
Melat Kiros, a 29-year-old democratic socialist, unseated Rep. Diana DeGette in a Democratic primary to represent the Denver area.

The post Left-wing insurgent ousts 15-term member of Congress in Colorado appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Melat Kiros, a 29-year-old democratic socialist, won Colorado's Democratic primary.
Kiros defeated 15-term incumbent Rep. Diana DeGette, signaling a shift in voter preferences.
This victory may inspire similar progressive movements in Boston's local elections.

articles.title: Woman wading in Florida river dies after being bitten by alligator
articles.description:
The woman, 31, was kneeling in the shallow part of a river in Seminole County, in Central Florida, when an alligator bit her, authorities said.

The post Woman wading in Florida river dies after being bitten by alligator appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 31-year-old woman died after an alligator bite in Florida's Seminole County.
The incident occurred while she was wading in a river, highlighting dangers of wildlife.
Boston residents should remain cautious during outdoor activities near water bodies.

articles.title: What Revolution players are saying about ex-teammate facing the U.S. in the World Cup Round of 32
articles.description:
“He always talked about playing for the Bosnian national team. It's very important to him, because of his family.”

The post What Revolution players are saying about ex-teammate facing the U.S. in the World Cup Round of 32 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Former Revolution player Esmir Bajraktarevic represents Bosnia in the World Cup Round of 32.
Bajraktarevic's family ties to Bosnia make this match significant for him personally.
Local fans are excited to see a former player compete on the world stage.

articles.title: Local obituary: Jake Mick, 31, state trooper and father to infant daughter
articles.description:
"Jake understood wearing that uniform was more than a career—it was a privilege which he never took for granted."

The post Local obituary: Jake Mick, 31, state trooper and father to infant daughter appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jake Mick, 31, a state trooper, passed away, leaving behind an infant daughter.
Mick valued his role as a trooper, viewing it as a privilege.
His death impacts the Boston community, highlighting the sacrifices of local law enforcement.

articles.title: 24-year-old woman dies after falling off jet ski in Mass. pond
articles.description:
The woman was a passenger on the jet ski.

Residents are urged to prioritize safety measures while engaging in water sports.

articles.title: Father facing several charges after 5-year-old son killed, 10-month-old daughter injured in Maine crash
articles.description:
The 33-year-old Indiana man was allegedly driving under the influence at the time of the crash last week. Neither child was properly restrained, police said.

The post Father facing several charges after 5-year-old son killed, 10-month-old daughter injured in Maine crash appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: 33-year-old Indiana man charged after fatal crash in Maine involving his children.
5-year-old son died and 10-month-old daughter injured; neither child was properly restrained.
Incident raises concerns about child safety and DUI enforcement in Massachusetts.
